name: int4-mtp-batchinv
description: int4 W4A16 Gemma-4-E4B target + QAT-matched gemma4_assistant MTP drafter (speculative decoding), with vLLM batch-invariant kernels (VLLM_BATCH_INVARIANT=1) enabled so the M=K+1 spec-verify forward is numerically batch-invariant with the M=1 AR forward -> greedy-token-identical spec decode.
